columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp of the record creation or modification

columns.name: BRUKER
columns.description: The identifier for the user who created or modified the order

columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: The number of the department associated with the order

columns.name: INNGANGNR
columns.description: The inbound order reference or identifier

columns.name: LAGERSTED
columns.description: The warehouse location where the order is stored or processed

columns.name: INNGDATO
columns.description: The date when the inbound order was received

columns.name: LEVNR
columns.description: The number of the supplier associated with the order

columns.name: ORDRENR
columns.description: The unique identifier for the order

columns.name: TRANSPORTOR
columns.description: The identifier of the transporter responsible for the delivery

columns.name: PAKKSEDDEL
columns.description: The reference number or identifier of the packing slip

columns.name: LASTESTED
columns.description: The timestamp indicating when the order was last updated

columns.name: BILNR
columns.description: The number of the vehicle used for delivery or transportation

columns.name: REF_INNGANGNR
columns.description: The reference inbound order number associated with this record

columns.name: KONTRAKTNR
columns.description: The contract number related to the order

columns.name: LASTCHANGED
columns.description: The timestamp indicating when the record was last changed or modified
